h1: Should You Modify Your Injection Mold or Build a New Mold?

headings.text: Should You Modify Your Injection Mold or Build a New Mold?
Does making a new injection mold cost more than modifying an existing injection mold?
When should you modify an existing injection mold?
When should you make a new injection mold?
Applying Smart Design Principles to Amplify Benefits of Additive Manufacturing

meta_description: In some cases, modifying your existing mold makes sense. Here’s what you need to know to make the best decision for your project.

sections.heading: Should You Modify Your Injection Mold or Build a New Mold?
sections.text: Should You Modify Your Injection Mold or Build a New Mold? Published on May 31, 2022 Originally published on fastradius.com on May 31, 2022 Injection molding is the most popular mass production method when creating large volumes of identical plastic parts — and for good reason. While you may need to invest a significant amount of money upfront to manufacture injection mold tooling , your price per unit will be extremely low if you produce parts en masse and will continue to drop as you make more pieces. A complete injection mold system consists of a mold base and one or more sets of core and cavity inserts — these inserts are the primary components that mold your part. However, you may also...
